'''Circarpous Major''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous system]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Shadow Games]]''
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1st}}
